name: clipboard_get
description: Read the current clipboard text. Browser will ask permission the first time.

name: send_notification
description: Show a browser notification. User must grant permission.

name: set_timer
description: Start a countdown timer that pops a notification when done.

name: open_url
description: Open a URL in a new browser tab.

name: show_message
description: Display a message in the on-page result area. Use for queries that don't need any other action.
